text: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Please refund the duplicate charge.
The app crashes every time I try to upload a file larger than 10MB.
I can't reset my password. The reset email never arrives.
It would be great if you could add dark mode to the mobile app.
My invoice shows the wrong tax rate. I'm in Oregon and there should be no sales tax.
Getting a 502 Bad Gateway error when accessing the dashboard since yesterday.
How do I change the email address associated with my account?
Can you add an option to export reports as CSV files?
I cancelled my plan but was still charged for next month.
The search function returns no results even when I search for exact titles.
I need to merge two accounts that I accidentally created with different emails.
Would love to see Slack integration for notifications.
Please explain the difference between the Pro and Enterprise billing plans.
API responses are timing out after 30 seconds on the /users endpoint.
My account was locked after too many failed login attempts. How do I unlock it?
Can you add two-factor authentication using hardware security keys?
I need a copy of all invoices from last year for my tax filing.
The webhook endpoint is not receiving POST events anymore.
How do I transfer ownership of my organization to another team member?
Please add the ability to schedule reports to be emailed weekly.
Why was I charged a different amount than what's shown on the pricing page?
Images are not loading in the email editor. I see broken image icons.
I want to delete my account and all associated data permanently.
It would be helpful to have keyboard shortcuts for common actions.
Can I get a refund for the unused portion of my annual subscription?
The mobile app freezes on the login screen on Android 14.
How do I add team members to my workspace?
Please add support for Markdown formatting in comments.
My credit card was declined but my bank shows no issues. Can you retry?
The drag and drop feature doesn't work in Safari browser.
I need to update my company name on the account. How do I do this?
Could you add an API endpoint for bulk user creation?
I'm being charged for 10 seats but only have 5 active users.
Getting CORS errors when calling the API from my React app.
My SSO login through Google is giving an OAuth error.
Please add a way to set custom reminder times for tasks.
I need to switch from monthly to annual billing. Will I get the discount?
The notification bell shows a count of 5 but there are no new notifications.
How do I set up role-based access control for my team?
It would be great to have a mobile widget for quick task entry.
My promo code isn't working at checkout. It says expired but it shouldn't be.
PDF export is cutting off the right side of wide tables.
I forgot which email I used to sign up. Can you help me find my account?
Can you add the ability to create custom fields in the project view?
How do I apply my education discount to an existing subscription?
The calendar view doesn't sync with Google Calendar properly.
I need to revoke API keys for a former employee. Where is this setting?
Would love to see a Gantt chart view for project timelines.
There's a pending charge on my card but my subscription shows as inactive.
The real-time collaboration feature has a 10-second lag for remote users.
How do I enable audit logs for compliance purposes?
Please add support for custom email templates in automations.
I was charged in USD but I selected EUR as my billing currency.
The file preview for .docx files shows garbled text.
I can't find where to update my billing address for tax purposes.
Can you add conditional logic to form fields?
My nonprofit discount was removed during the last renewal. Can you reinstate it?
Sorting by date in the table view puts items in wrong order.
I need to change my username but the option is grayed out.
It would be great to have version history for documents.
The autopay feature charged my old card instead of the newly added one.
Memory usage spikes to 4GB when loading dashboards with many widgets.
How do I set up SAML SSO for my organization?
Can you add a public API for third-party integrations?
I need an itemized receipt that shows per-user charges for each month.
The browser extension conflicts with our company's ad blocker.
My two-factor authentication app was on my old phone. I can't log in now.
Please add the ability to archive projects without deleting them.
Why does my invoice show a charge for a feature I never activated?
The video conferencing integration keeps disconnecting every 5 minutes.
I'm locked out because my backup codes don't work either.
Would love to see AI-powered suggestions for task assignments.
Can I pause my subscription for 2 months instead of cancelling?
Automated tests in the CI pipeline are failing with authentication errors.
How do I configure which notifications each team member receives?
Please add a built-in time tracking feature for tasks.
The annual plan price increased without any prior notification.
Data import from CSV fails silently — no error message, no data imported.
I need to restrict which IP addresses can access our workspace.
Can you add the ability to create recurring tasks?
My payment method expired and I didn't get a reminder. Now there's a late fee.
The desktop app shows a white screen after the latest update on Windows 11.
How do I downgrade my admin role to a regular user?
It would be useful to have a command palette like VS Code.
I need a W-9 or tax form from your company for our records.
The spell-check feature marks correct words as misspelled.
I want to remove myself from a shared workspace without deleting it.
Please add the option to set task dependencies.
We have 50 users but the invoice shows charges for 52. Where are the extra 2?
Print layout is broken — content overlaps headers on every page.
How do I enable guest access for external contractors?
Can you add native integration with Jira for issue syncing?
I accidentally deleted my payment method. Now I can't access premium features.
The auto-save feature is not working. I lost 30 minutes of edits.
I need to verify my identity to regain access to a compromised account.
Would love to see a kanban board view for task management.
I'm on the free tier but I keep getting charged $1 test transactions.
The API rate limiter is too aggressive — I'm being throttled at only 10 req/min.
Can I have separate login credentials for my personal and work accounts?
Please add support for custom themes and branding on the dashboard.
